reason: Given the context date of 2026-07-05, mid-January publication is ~6 months prior, well past the 3-month window under §412 (which closes in mid-April). The candidate correctly applies this timing, correctly states that registration is still required to sue, correctly limits recovery to actual damages/profits (not statutory damages/fees) for the already-begun infringement, and correctly notes new registration would only cover future infringements. This matches the reference's "past that window" branch and the core legal rule (3-month/pre-infringement registration requirement for statutory damages). No contradiction of the core fact.
